briefdescription.para: The default size (in bytes) of a Server-SDO memory buffer in the absence of dynamic memory allocation.

detaileddescription.para: The default size is large enough to accomodate the maximum block size used by SDO block transfer.

briefdescription.para: An opaque CANopen Server-SDO state type.
The 'stopped' state.
The 'waiting' state.
The 'download segment' state.
The 'upload segment' state.
The 'block download sub-block' state.
The 'block download end' state.
The 'block upload sub-block' state.
The 'block upload end' state.
Allocates memory for co_ssdo_t object using allocator from can_net_t.
Frees memory allocated for co_ssdo_t object.
Initializes co_ssdo_t object.
Finalizes co_ssdo_t object.
Checks if a new COB-ID is a correct replacement for the old one.
Updates and (de)activates a Server-SDO service.

detaileddescription.para: This function is invoked when one of the SDO server parameters (objects 1200..127F) is updated.

briefdescription.para: The download indication function for (all sub-objects of) CANopen objects 1200..127F (SDO server parameter).
The CAN receive callback function for a Server-SDO service.
The CAN timer callback function for a Server-SDO service.
Enters the specified state of a Server-SDO service.
Invokes the 'abort' transition function of the current state of a Server-SDO service.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
the abort code.

briefdescription.para: Invokes the 'timeout' transition function of the current state of a Server-SDO service.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
a pointer to the current time.

briefdescription.para: Invokes the 'CAN frame received' transition function of the current state of a Server-SDO service.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
a pointer to the received CAN frame.

briefdescription.para: The 'abort' transition function of the 'waiting' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'waiting' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'download initiate' state.
The 'download initiate' state.

detaileddescription.para: The 'abort' transition function of the 'download segment' state.

briefdescription.para: The 'timeout' transition function of the 'download segment' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'download segment' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'upload initiate' state.
The 'upload initiate' state.

detaileddescription.para: The 'abort' transition function of the 'upload segment' state.

briefdescription.para: The 'timeout' transition function of the 'upload segment' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'upload segment' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'block download initiate' state.
The 'block download initiate' state.

detaileddescription.para: The 'abort' transition function of the 'block download sub-block' state.

briefdescription.para: The 'timeout' transition function of the 'block download sub-block' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'block download sub-block' state.
The 'abort' transition function of the 'block download end' state.
The 'timeout' transition function of the 'block download end' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'block download end' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'block upload initiate' state.
The 'block upload initiate' state.

detaileddescription.para: The 'abort' transition function of the 'block upload sub-block' state.

briefdescription.para: The 'timeout' transition function of the 'block upload sub-block' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'block upload sub-block' state.
The 'abort' transition function of the 'block upload end' state.
The 'timeout' transition function of the 'block upload end' state.
The 'CAN frame received' transition function of the 'block upload end' state.
Processes an abort transfer indication by aborting any ongoing transfer of a Server-SDO and returning it to the waiting state.
Sends an abort transfer request and aborts any ongoing transfer by invoking co_ssdo_abort_ind().

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
the SDO abort code.

briefdescription.para: Sends an abort transfer request and aborts the ongoing download request by invoking co_ssdo_dn_ind() and co_ssdo_abort_ind().

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
the SDO abort code.

briefdescription.para: Sends an abort transfer request and aborts the ongoing upload request by invoking co_ssdo_up_ind() and co_ssdo_abort_ind().

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
the SDO abort code.

briefdescription.para: Processes a download indication of a Server-SDO by checking access to the requested sub-object and reading the data from the frame.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

briefdescription.para: Processes an upload indication of a Server-SDO by checking access to the requested sub-object and writing the data to the internal buffer.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

briefdescription.para: Copies at most nbyte bytes from a CANopen SDO upload request, obtaining more bytes with co_ssdo_up_ind() as necessary.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or an SDO abort code on error.

briefdescription.para: Sends an abort transfer request.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
the SDO abort code.

briefdescription.para: Sends a Server-SDO 'download initiate' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'download segment' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'upload initiate' (expedited) response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'upload initiate' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'upload segment' response.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
a flag indicating whether this is the last segment.

briefdescription.para: Sends a Server-SDO 'block download initiate' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'block upload sub-block' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'block download end' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'block upload initiate' response.
Sends a Server-SDO 'block upload sub-block' response.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
a flag indicating whether this block contains the last segment.

briefdescription.para: Sends a Server-SDO 'block upload end' response.
Initializes a Server-SDO download/upload initiate response CAN frame.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
a pointer to the CAN frame to be initialized.
the command specifier.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a Server-SDO download/upload segment response CAN frame.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
a pointer to the CAN frame to be initialized.
the command specifier.

briefdescription.para: Returns the alignment (in bytes) of the co_ssdo_t structure.
Returns the size (in bytes) of the co_ssdo_t structure.
Creates a new CANopen Server-SDO service.

detaileddescription.para: The service is stopped after creation and SHOULD be started with co_ssdo_start() before use.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CAN network.
a pointer to a CANopen device describing the server.
the SDO number (in the range [1..128]). Except when num is 1, the SDO parameter record MUST exist in the object dictionary of dev.

simplesect.para: a pointer to a new Server-SDO service, or NULL on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: Destroys a CANopen Server-SDO service.
Starts a Server-SDO service.
Stops a Server-SDO service.
Returns true if the specified Server-SDO service is stopped, and false if not.
Returns a pointer to the CAN network of a Server-SDO.
Returns a pointer to the CANopen device of a Server-SDO.
Returns the SDO number of a Server-SDO.
Returns a pointer to the SDO parameter record of a Server-SDO.
Returns the timeout (in milliseconds) of a Server-SDO.

detaileddescription.para: A return value of 0 (the default) means no timeout is being used.

briefdescription.para: Sets the timeout of a Server-SDO.

detaileddescription.para: If the timeout expires before receiving a request from a client, the server aborts the transfer.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Server-SDO service.
the timeout (in milliseconds). A value of 0 (the default) disables the timeout.

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen library; it contains the implementation of the Server-SDO functions.

detaileddescription.para:
The implementation follows CiA 301 version 4.2.0. See section 7.2.4 for the definition of the SDO services and protocols. The following objects determine the behavior of SSDOs:
1200..127F: SDO server parameter
